description: Thank you for joining our online service. If you are watching on your computer or phone we would encourage you to watch from https://milehighvineyard.online.church where you can have a more interactive experience! You can text "hi" or your prayer requests to (833) 460-7312 if you're new. We'd love to connect with you and say, "hi" back!

title: We Believe In | Sacred Life | Jay Pathak | Mile High Vineyard
description: Thank you for joining our online service! If you are watching on your computer or phone we would encourage you to watch from https://milehighvineyard.online.church where you can interact with pastors and each other, get prayer during service and have a more interactive experience! Do you have kids?! Check out our awesome Kidventure Online Material including a weekly video, worship and project! www.milehighvineyard.org/kidventure Also don't forget to connect with us by filling out a connect card on the MHV App or by using this link! https://mhv.churchcenter.com/people/forms/44892
